testcase.name: validateCoursePrice

failure.message: Failed to validate price for course: Full Stack QA Program due to: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//h3[normalize-space()='Full Stack QA Program']"} (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.117) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [c1d2c8f00190dc0361d138919b49adf6, findElement {value=//h3[normalize-space()='Full Stack QA Program'], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.117, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\PRAJNA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:60488}, goog:processID: 17104, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:60488/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.117, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: c1d2c8f00190dc0361d138919b49adf6
